title: Create CameraService with device enumeration, stream management and camera switching
acceptance_criteria: On init: enumerates videoinput devices via navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices()
cameras and selectedCamera exposed as signals (list + currently selected device)
enableCameraForVideoElement(videoEl, deviceId, onReady): opens getUserMedia stream, attaches to video element, calls onReady callback once metadata is loaded
stopStream(): stops all tracks on current MediaStream
switchCamera(deviceId): stops current stream then starts new one for the given deviceId
Uses inject() function pattern, not constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: Created CameraService with signals, enumerateDevices, enableCameraForVideoElement, stopStream, switchCamera. CameraDevice interface co-located.
